zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Ward於大約1543年出生在英國諾福爾可費爾比時，他的父親John Ward34歲，母親Mrs. Jennet Warde31歲。他於1566年11月18日與?結婚。他去世於1598年1月2日在他的家鄉享年56歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可費爾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Ward于大约1543年出生在英国諾福爾可費爾比时，他的父亲John Ward34岁，母亲Mrs. Jennet Warde31岁。他于1566年11月18日与?结婚。他去世于1598年1月2日在他的家乡享年56岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可費爾比。

nameMeanings.name: Ward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a watchman or guard, from Middle English ward ‘watchman, guard’ (Old English weard, used as both an agent noun and an abstract noun).
English: occupational name from Middle English warde ‘armed guard’ (Old English weard ‘watching, guarding’), with the same meaning as 1 above.

Irish: shortened form of McWard, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Bhaird ‘son of the poet’. The surname occurs throughout Ireland, where three different branches of the family are known as professional poets.

variants.name: Warshawsky
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Meyer, Ari, Hyman.

Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from the city of Warsaw (Polish Warszawa), which became the capital of Poland at the end of the 16th century, after the destruction of Kraków by fire.
Americanized form of Polish Warszawski, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Wardman
meanings: English (Yorkshire): occupational name from Middle English wardman, either in the general sense ‘watchman, guard’ (compare Ward ) or in the administrative sense ‘representative of a ward within a borough’.

variants.name: Warde
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Donal.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Ward was born about 1543, in Filby, Norfolk, England, his father, John Ward, was 34 and his mother, Mrs. Jennet Warde, was 31. He married ? on 18 November 1566. He died on 2 January 1598, in his hometown, at the age of 56, and was buried in Filby, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Ward est né environ 1543, à Filby, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John Ward, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Jennet Warde, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé ? le 18 novembre 1566. Il est décédé le 2 janvier 1598, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Filby, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Ward um 1543 in Filby, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Ward 34 und seine Mutter Mrs. Jennet Warde 31. Er hat am 18. November 1566 ? geheiratet. Er starb am 2. Januar 1598 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Filby, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Ward è nato il circa 1543 nel Filby, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, John Ward, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Jennet Warde, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato ? il 18 novembre 1566. Morì il 2 gennaio 1598, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Filby, Norfolk, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Ward(이)가 대략 1543년 영국 노르폴크 피비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Ward(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Jennet Warde(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1566년 11월 18일 ?(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1598년 1월 2일 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 피비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Ward nasceu aproximadamente 1543, em Filby, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Ward, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Jennet Warde, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com ? em 18 de novembro de 1566. Ele faleceu em 2 de janeiro de 1598, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Filby, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Ward родился около 1543 г. в местности филби, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Ward было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Jennet Warde, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени ? 18 ноября 1566 г. Он умер 2 января 1598 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности филби, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Ward nació aproximadamente 1543, en Filby, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Ward, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Mrs. Jennet Warde, tenía 31 años. Se casó con ? el 18 de noviembre de 1566. Murió el 2 de enero de 1598, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Filby, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
